message:
feat(core): add deterministic fleet launch plan with phased startup and weighted ordering (ft-3681t.3.1)

Extend session profiles with FleetStartupStrategy, FleetLaunchPlan, and
per-slot weight/phase scheduling. The launch planner computes deterministic
slot ordering (phase asc -> weight desc -> label asc -> index asc), program
mix summaries, and topology initialization metadata. Adds validation for
duplicate slot labels and zero-weight slots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
